mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_runs (user_id, agent_name, input_summary, output_summary, status, duration_ms, token_count, model_name, error_message) VALUES (#{userId}, #{agentName}, #{inputSummary}, #{outputSummary}, #{status}, #{durationMs}, #{tokenCount}, #{modelName}, #{errorMessage})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, agent_name, input_summary, output_summary, status, duration_ms, token_count, model_name, error_message, created_at FROM agent_runs WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, user_id, agent_name, input_summary, output_summary, status, duration_ms, token_count, model_name, error_message, created_at FROM agent_runs WHERE agent_name = #{agentName} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, user_id, agent_name, input_summary, output_summary, status, duration_ms, token_count, model_name, error_message, created_at FROM agent_runs WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, user_id, agent_name, input_summary, output_summary, status, duration_ms, token_count, model_name, error_message, created_at FROM agent_runs ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
